title: Vintage Shopping in Paris & Florence, Shopping My Sister’s Closet and Birthday Trip to Italy
description:
Welcome loves, 

This is one of my favorite vlogs to date, as we spend time in two of my favorite cities: Paris and Florence. I take you along for some incredible vintage shopping in Paris and I will find an insane vintage Roberto Cavalli piece in Florence.
Before the trip, I also raid my sister's closet to find the perfect pieces for an Italian escape.

I hope you enjoy this vlog! 
Always with love,
Karen 

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/karennapoly/?hl=fr 
Tik Tok: https://www.tiktok.com
